concepts.headline: Fueling the Mission's late-night brushstrokes.
concepts.subline: Single-origin espresso and local art till late.
concepts.rationale: Appeals to the local creative nightlife and artist community with a moody, high-contrast aesthetic.

concepts.headline: Café local para mentes que nunca duermen.
concepts.subline: Prensa fría y espresso en el corazón del barrio.
concepts.rationale: Connects directly with Spanish-speaking creatives and commuters using a bold, artistic, and familiar visual.
